# Module 7.3.1: Building Chat History (Step-by-Step)

Learn how to give your AI a **memory** by saving and retrieving conversations from your database.

---

## 🛠️ Build it step-by-step

Choose your database to see how to save and retrieve chat history in your backend. In this example, we will use **MongoDB + Mongoose**.

### 1️⃣ Define the Chat Schema
Ask Windsurf: `"Create a Mongoose schema for Chat that stores userId, message, response, and a timestamp. Export the model."`

```javascript
const mongoose = require('mongoose');
// ... (code will be generated by Windsurf)
```

### 2️⃣ Save a Message after each AI response
Ask Windsurf: `"Update my AI chat route so that after receiving the AI reply, it saves both the user's message and the AI's response to the Chat collection in MongoDB."`

```javascript
// ... (Windsurf will update your existing route)
```

### 3️⃣ Retrieve History for a User
Ask Windsurf: `"Create a GET /api/chat/history route that retrieves the last 20 chat messages for the currently logged-in user, sorted by the most recent first."`

```javascript
// ... (Windsurf will create the route)
```

### 4️⃣ Feed History back to AI for context (The "Memory" Trick)
Ask Windsurf: `"Modify my AI chat logic to retrieve the user's recent chat history and pass it as context to the OpenAI/Claude API, so the AI remembers previous parts of the conversation."`

```javascript

```

---

## 🎨 Lovable AI Prompt (Chat Memory UI)

```text
Build a "Chat Interface with History" using React and Tailwind.

Requirements:
- Left Sidebar: Show a list of "Past Conversations" with timestamps.
- Main Area: A scrollable chat window that stays pinned to the bottom.
- Behavior: 
  - When I click a past conversation, it should load those messages.
  - Show a "Typing..." indicator while waiting for the AI.
- Backend: http://localhost:3000/api/chat
```

---

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] Your schema includes `userId` so users don't see each other's chats.
- [ ] You are using `.sort({ timestamp: -1 })` to get the latest messages.
- [ ] You are mapping DB records to the `role: user/assistant` format.
- [ ] The AI can now reference things you said 3 messages ago.
